infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: SafeHer uses your location to share your position with guardians during SOS and Safe Journey.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: SafeHer uses background location only for active journeys and emergency live tracking.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: SafeHer uses your location to share your position with guardians during SOS and Safe Journey.
plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: SafeHer uses background location only for active journeys and emergency live tracking.

plugins.microphonePermission: SafeHer uses the microphone only when you enable audio evidence or sound-triggered SOS.

plugins.cameraPermission: SafeHer uses the camera only when you choose evidence capture or hidden-camera checks.

plugins.faceIDPermission: SafeHer uses Face ID to protect your safety profile, guardians and evidence vault.
